pair.title: Connect Alfen ACE Charger
pair.note: Make sure Modbus TCP is enabled in the ACE Service Installer (Active Load Balancing → TCP/IP EMS). Port 502, unit addresses 1 (socket) and 200 (station) are used automatically.

errors.port_required: Port must be a valid number

warnings.lb_interval_too_high: Load balancing interval is equal to or greater than the Alfen validity time (60 s). The charger may fall back to safe current.
warnings.meter_device_not_found: Energy meter device not found. Check the device ID in settings.
warnings.meter_capability_missing: Energy meter device does not expose measure_current.L1/L2/L3. Load balancing inactive.
warnings.meter_data_stale: Energy meter data is stale — no update received within expected interval. Charge current reduced to 6 A safe minimum.
warnings.meter_waiting_for_data: Meter device found but no measurements received yet. Check that the energy meter is online and reporting values.

notifications.pause_cleared_by_slider: Charging pause cleared — charge current manually set to {amps} A.
